name: Insulin Signaling Pathway
description: Insulin signaling: the insulin receptor autophosphorylates and recruits IRS proteins, activating PI3K-Akt to branch into GLUT4-mediated glucose uptake, glycogen synthesis and mTOR-driven growth, with S6K feedback dampening IRS.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Insulin binds receptor"]
    N2["Receptor autophosphorylation"]
    N3["IRS-1/2 phosphorylated"]
    N4["PI3K -> PIP3"]
    N5["PDK1 + Akt activated"]
    N6{"Which branch?"}
    N7["GLUT4 translocation"]
    N8["Glucose uptake"]
    N9["GSK3 inhibited -> glycogen"]
    N10["mTOR -> growth"]
    N11["S6K feedback on IRS"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 -->|glucose| N7
    N7 --> N8
    N6 -->|glycogen| N9
    N6 -->|growth| N10
    N10 --> N11
    N11 -->|inhibit| N3

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    style N11 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff

flowchartStandard.name: source_grounded_extraction_v2
flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.
